nodes.name: Cron — Quarter Start
nodes.notes: First day of each quarter at 8 AM. Creates a new quarter record and triggers the planning workflow.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO canonical_quarter (year, quarter, name, start_date, end_date, status, rocks) VALUES (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int, EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int, CONCAT('Q', EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int, ' ', EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int), DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CURRENT_DATE)::date, (DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '3 months' - INTERVAL '1 day')::date, 'planning', '[]'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (year, quarter) DO NOTHING RETURNING id, name;

parameters.subject: Quarterly Planning: {{$json.name}} — Review Rocks
parameters.text:
A new quarter has started: {{$json.name}}.

Please review and update your quarterly rocks.

This is a Rockefeller Habits trigger from your TAS Operating System.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO event_log (event_type, entity_type, source, metadata) VALUES ('QuarterPlanningStarted', 'quarter', 'n8n', jsonb_build_object('quarter_id', $1, 'name', $2));

INSERT INTO health_checks (component, last_run, status, message) VALUES ('quarterly_planning', NOW(), 'ok', $1) ON CONFLICT (component) DO UPDATE SET last_run = EXCLUDED.last_run, status = EXCLUDED.status, message = EXCLUDED.message;

meta.description: Cron first day of quarter 8 AM. Creates canonical_quarter record, emails Fabian to review rocks. From original Phase 1 Build Manual — Rockefeller Habits.
